g.text: In use: one Secret, both directions
Read this against the LLM API key figure.
There the Secret sat inside kaalm-system, was read by
exactly two ServiceAccounts through a plain namespaced Role, and was never copied. Here the same two
ServiceAccounts read it, but the Secret sits in the agent's namespace, so the grant has to be minted
per channel, resourceNames-scoped, and garbage-collected with the AgentChannel. The agent Pod holds
no credential material in either figure.
